briefing_zh:
今天最值得关注的是 Berkeley RDI 发布的 AI agent benchmark 漏洞分析——**537 分 HN 热帖**揭示了当前最主流的 agent 评测基准存在严重可利用漏洞，agent 可以通过非预期路径刷高分数，引发社区对评测可靠性的深度反思。这与 **ClawBench** 的发现遥相呼应：在 153 个真实网站上的写操作任务中，前沿模型成功率仅 **0.7%-33.3%**，说明现有 benchmark 可能严重高估了 agent 的真实能力。

论文方面，**SkillClaw** 提出让 agent 技能通过跨用户交互持续进化，自主 evolver 实现了 +42.1% 的平均提升。**Neural Computers** 来自 Meta AI 和 KAUST，提出了全新计算范式——将计算、内存和 I/O 全部内化到学习的运行时状态中，3400+ 浏览量领跑 alphaxiv。**Externalization Framework** 则从反方向切入，把认知负担外化到持久化结构中提升 agent 可靠性。

开源生态方面，Hermes Agent 相关项目本周集中爆发：**橙皮书教程**（2200+ star）、**意识监控面板**（783 star）、**fireworks-tech-graph** 技术图表生成技能（1862 star）。**auto-deep-researcher** 提供了 24/7 自动跑深度学习实验的方案。**Marimo pair** 把响应式 Python notebook 变成 agent 的运行环境，140 分 HN 热帖。
briefing_en:
The biggest story today is Berkeley RDI's analysis of exploitable vulnerabilities in major AI agent benchmarks — a **537-point HN post** revealing that current evaluation frameworks can be gamed through unintended pathways. This resonates with **ClawBench**'s findings: frontier models achieve only **0.7%-33.3% success rates** on 153 real-world write-heavy tasks across production websites, suggesting benchmarks may severely overestimate actual agent capabilities.

In research, **SkillClaw** introduces continuous skill evolution through collective cross-user interactions, with an autonomous evolver achieving **+42.1% average improvement**. **Neural Computers** from Meta AI + KAUST proposes a new computing paradigm where computation, memory, and I/O are internalized within a learned runtime state — leading alphaxiv with 3,400+ views. The **Externalization Framework** takes the opposite approach, offloading cognitive burdens to persistent external structures for agent reliability.

The open-source ecosystem is flourishing: Hermes Agent projects surged this week — **Orange Book tutorial** (2,200+ stars), **consciousness monitor UI** (783 stars), **fireworks-tech-graph** diagram skill (1,862 stars). **auto-deep-researcher** enables 24/7 autonomous DL experiment running. **Marimo pair** turns reactive Python notebooks into agent environments — 140-point HN hit.
viral_analysis_zh: Berkeley 的 benchmark 漏洞分析能拿 537 分，核心原因是戳中了行业痛点：大家都在用 benchmark 证明 agent 有多强，但评测本身可能是假的。这种「皇帝新衣」叙事天然高传播。ClawBench 的 0.7% 成功率数字同样震撼——具体数字比模糊结论更容易引爆讨论。
viral_analysis_en: Berkeley's benchmark exploit analysis hit 537 points by exposing the industry's uncomfortable truth: everyone uses benchmarks to prove agent capability, but the evaluations themselves may be flawed. This 'emperor's new clothes' narrative naturally goes viral. ClawBench's 0.7% success rate similarly shocks — concrete numbers spark discussion far more than vague conclusions.

huggingface_papers.title: WildDet3D: Scaling Promptable 3D Detection in the Wild
huggingface_papers.tldr: A unified 3D object detection framework that scales to open-world scenarios with multiple prompt types. Built on a large-scale dataset enabling detection of novel object categories without retraining, bridging the gap between closed-vocabulary and open-world 3D perception.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 统一的开放世界 3D 目标检测框架，支持多种 prompt 类型。基于大规模数据集实现了对新类别物体的零样本检测能力，弥合了封闭词表和开放世界 3D 感知之间的鸿沟。对自动驾驶和机器人场景有直接价值。

huggingface_papers.title: FORGE: Fine-grained Multimodal Evaluation for Manufacturing Scenarios
huggingface_papers.tldr: A high-quality multimodal manufacturing dataset with fine-grained domain semantics for evaluating MLLMs on industrial inspection, defect detection, and quality control tasks. Reveals that current MLLMs struggle significantly with manufacturing-specific visual reasoning.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 面向制造业场景的高质量多模态评测数据集，包含细粒度工业语义。评估了 MLLM 在工业质检、缺陷检测和质量控制任务上的能力，揭示了当前模型在制造业专用视觉推理上的严重不足。

huggingface_papers.title: RefineAnything: Multimodal Region-Specific Refinement for Perfect Local Details
huggingface_papers.tldr: A multimodal diffusion model for region-specific image refinement that preserves global structure while perfecting local details. Users can specify regions via text, bounding boxes, or segmentation masks, enabling precise control over image editing without affecting unselected areas.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 基于扩散模型的区域级图像精修方案，在完善局部细节的同时保持全局结构不变。支持通过文字、边界框或分割掩码指定修改区域，实现精准可控的图像编辑，不影响未选定区域。

huggingface_papers.title: EXAONE 4.5 Technical Report
huggingface_papers.tldr: LG AI Research's open-weight vision language model integrating a visual encoder into EXAONE 4.0. Achieves enhanced multimodal understanding with competitive performance across vision-language benchmarks while keeping weights fully open for community use.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: LG AI Research 的开源视觉语言模型，在 EXAONE 4.0 基础上集成了视觉编码器。在多模态理解任务上取得了有竞争力的表现，同时完全开放权重供社区使用。

huggingface_papers.title: Matrix-Game 3.0: Real-Time and Streaming Interactive World Model with Long-Horizon Memory
huggingface_papers.tldr: Skywork AI's interactive world model achieves real-time 720p generation with minute-long temporal consistency. Key innovations: error-aware modeling prevents cumulative drift, and camera-aware long-horizon memory maintains spatial structure. 28B parameters with streaming output.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Skywork AI 的交互式世界模型，核心突破是同时实现了实时 720p 高分辨率生成 + 分钟级长时间一致性。关键技术是错误感知建模（防止误差累积导致画面崩坏）和相机感知长时记忆。28B 参数，流式输出。

alphaxiv_papers.title: SkillClaw: Collective Skill Evolution for LLM Agents
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Enables LLM agent skills to continuously evolve through collective cross-user interaction experiences. An autonomous 'agentic evolver' refines, creates, and updates skills automatically, achieving +42.1% average improvement in controlled experiments.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 让 LLM agent 的技能通过跨用户交互经验持续进化。自主 evolver 自动精炼、创建和更新技能，在受控实验中实现了 +42.1% 的平均提升。核心思路是把个体经验变成集体智慧。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Neural Computers: A New Computing Paradigm
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Meta AI + KAUST propose internalizing computation, memory, and I/O within a learned runtime state. The model learns to generate terminal screens and control GUIs from user I/O traces — 3,400+ views on alphaxiv, the most-viewed paper this cycle.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Meta AI 和 KAUST 提出将计算、内存和 I/O 全部内化到学习的运行时状态中。模型从用户 I/O 轨迹学习生成终端画面和控制 GUI，alphaxiv 本期最高浏览量（3400+）。

alphaxiv_papers.title: ClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World Web Agent Write Tasks
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: 153 write-heavy tasks across 144 live production websites with safe interception. Frontier models achieve only 0.7%-33.3% success rates — exposing a massive gap between benchmark performance and real-world agent capability.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 在 144 个真实生产网站上构建了 153 个写操作任务，配合安全拦截机制。前沿模型成功率仅 0.7%-33.3%，暴露了 benchmark 成绩和真实 agent 能力之间的巨大鸿沟。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Externalization in LLM-Based Agents: A Unified Review
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Proposes 'externalization' as a unifying principle for LLM agent reliability — offloading cognitive burdens to persistent external structures including memory, skills, protocols, and harness engineering.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出「外化」作为统一 LLM agent 可靠性的核心原则——把认知负担卸载到持久化外部结构中，涵盖记忆、技能、协议和 harness 工程四个维度。

alphaxiv_papers.title: PaperOrchestra: Automated AI Research Paper Writing
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google's multi-agent framework converts pre-writing materials into submission-ready papers with deep literature reviews and diverse visuals. Simulated acceptance rates: 84% for CVPR, 81% for ICLR.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google 的多 agent 框架，把预写材料转化为可投稿论文，含深度文献综述和多样化图表。模拟接收率：CVPR 84%、ICLR 81%。

github_repos.name: alchaincyf/hermes-agent-orange-book
github_repos.tldr: Comprehensive Chinese-language tutorial series for Hermes Agent — from beginner to advanced. Covers the entire Nous Research open-source AI agent framework with practical examples and real deployment guides.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Hermes Agent 从入门到精通的中文教程系列——橙皮书。涵盖 Nous Research 开源 AI Agent 框架的完整实战指南，从基础配置到高级技能开发。

github_repos.name: yizhiyanhua-ai/fireworks-tech-graph
github_repos.tldr: Claude Code skill for generating production-quality SVG+PNG technical diagrams. Supports 8 diagram types including architecture, flow, sequence, and ER diagrams with professional styling.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Claude Code 技能插件，生成专业级 SVG+PNG 技术图表。支持架构图、流程图、时序图、ER 图等 8 种图表类型，开箱即用。

github_repos.name: joeynyc/hermes-hudui
github_repos.tldr: Web-based consciousness monitor dashboard for Hermes Agent. Visualizes agent state, memory usage, active tasks, and real-time tool execution in a clean UI — useful for debugging and understanding agent behavior.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Hermes Agent 的 Web 端意识监控面板。可视化 agent 状态、记忆用量、活跃任务和实时工具执行，方便调试和理解 agent 行为。

github_repos.name: Xiangyue-Zhang/auto-deep-researcher-24x7
github_repos.tldr: Autonomous AI agent that runs deep learning experiments 24/7 while you sleep. Leader-Worker architecture with zero-cost monitoring, automatic hyperparameter tuning, and experiment scheduling.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 24/7 自动跑深度学习实验的 AI agent。Leader-Worker 架构 + 零成本监控，支持自动超参调优和实验调度，适合科研人员解放双手。

github_repos.name: joyehuang/Learn-Open-Harness
github_repos.tldr: Official interactive tutorial for OpenHarness evaluation framework — 12 chapters from zero to hero. Covers building custom benchmarks, evaluation pipelines, and result analysis for LLM evaluation.
github_repos.tldr_zh: OpenHarness 评测框架的官方互动教程——12 章从零到精通。涵盖自定义 benchmark 构建、评测流水线和结果分析。

hackernews.title: Exploiting the most prominent AI agent benchmarks
hackernews.tldr: Berkeley RDI reveals systematic vulnerabilities in major AI agent benchmarks — agents can exploit unintended pathways to inflate scores. Calls into question the reliability of current agent evaluation methodologies and proposes principles for more trustworthy benchmarking.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Berkeley RDI 揭示了主流 AI agent 评测基准的系统性漏洞——agent 可以利用非预期路径刷高分数。质疑了当前 agent 评测方法论的可靠性，并提出了更可信的评测原则。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Is Hormuz open yet?
hackernews.tldr: A tracker for Hormuz, an AI-related project/tool that the community is eagerly awaiting. The simple 'is it open yet' format resonated strongly on HN, hitting 482 points — showing community appetite for transparency in AI project launches.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 追踪 Hormuz（一个社区期待的 AI 项目）是否开放的网站。简单的「开了没」格式在 HN 上引爆 482 分——反映了社区对 AI 项目发布透明度的强烈需求。

hackernews.title: Show HN: CSS Studio – Design by hand, code by agent
hackernews.tldr: A design tool where humans sketch visually and an AI agent generates the CSS code. Bridges the gap between visual design intent and code output, letting designers work naturally while agents handle implementation.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 人手动设计，agent 自动生成 CSS 代码的工具。弥合了视觉设计意图和代码输出之间的鸿沟，让设计师自然工作，agent 负责实现。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Marimo pair – Reactive Python notebooks as environments for agents
hackernews.tldr: Turns reactive Python notebooks into runtime environments for AI agents. Agents can execute code, observe outputs, and iterate in a structured notebook context — more constrained and observable than raw terminal access.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 把响应式 Python notebook 变成 AI agent 的运行环境。Agent 可以在结构化的 notebook 上下文中执行代码、观察输出并迭代——比原始终端访问更可控、更可观测。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: Twill.ai (YC S25) – Delegate to cloud agents, get back PRs
hackernews.tldr: YC S25 startup that lets you delegate coding tasks to cloud-based AI agents and receive pull requests back. Positions itself as managed agent infrastructure — you describe the task, agents do the work in cloud environments.
hackernews.tldr_zh: YC S25 创业公司，把编程任务委托给云端 AI agent，拿回 PR。定位为托管式 agent 基础设施——你描述任务，agent 在云环境中完成工作。
